name: caio

about.summary: Asynchronous file IO for Linux Posix and Windows.
Asynchronous file IO for Linux Posix and Windows.

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: caio
  version: 0.9.21

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/caio-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 4f1d30ad0f975de07b4a3ae1cd2e9275fa574f2ca0b49ba5ab16208575650a92

build:
  number: 1
  skip: match(python, "<3.6")
  script:
    - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - python
  host:
    - pip
    - python
    - setuptools >=42
  run:
    - python

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - caio
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
    script:
      - pip check

about:
  summary: Asynchronous file IO for Linux Posix and Windows.
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  homepage: https://github.com/mosquito/caio

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - thewchan
    - matthewfeickert

about.summary: Asynchronous file IO for Linux Posix and Windows.
